title: Exception to Chapter
doc_html:
§112. Exception to Chapter

            Warehouses coming under the jurisdiction of the Louisiana Agricultural Commodities Commission are not subject to the provisions of this Chapter.

            Acts 2009, No. 24, §6, eff. June 12, 2009.
doc_text:
§112.  Exception to Chapter
Warehouses coming under the jurisdiction of the Louisiana Agricultural
Commodities Commission are not subject to the provisions of this Chapter.
Acts 2009, No. 24, §6, eff. June 12, 2009.
